Explanation: The volleyball match described matches the 2016 FIVB World League Final, where Italy defeated Brazil 3-1 with set scores 25-23, 25-19, 15-25, 25-23. Brazil held the record for most national team competition titles in South America at the time [27712]. Italy fits the football clues (2010 World Cup: lost first match, yellow/red cards as described) and also won a rugby test match in Argentina in 2016, matching the other sport clue. Multiple sources and peer agents confirm the match took place at Atlas Arena, Łódź, Poland.
Exact Answer: Atlas Arena, Łódź, Poland
